svg.title: L23 — EPC Course Architecture: 7-Module IPNB Crosswalk
svg.desc: The proposed 7-module architecture for Equipping Pastors to Counsel, synthesizing IPNB capture work. Modules: Foundations, Theological Grounding, Thompson, Pastoral Care Across 9 Domains, Wider Christian Voices, Specialized Topics, and Capstone.
svg.text: Equipping Pastors to Counsel — Course Architecture
7 modules · ~40–50 sessions · synthesizes all IPNB pastoral captures (L11–L22)

g.text: Foundations of Pastoral Care (PART + IPNB)
4–5 sessions · the pastor's nervous system as the primary instrument
What is the mind · PART operationalized · the 9 domains overview · Norcross's relational factors
📖 Siegel — Pocket Guide to IPNB · Norcross — Psychotherapy Relationships That Work
Theological Grounding (Trinity · Imago Dei · sanctification)
4–5 sessions · the structural theological foundation under IPNB
Trinity + perichoresis · Imago Dei = MWe · 6 Interrogatives in Christian frame · 3 divergences · 8 synthesis rules
📖 Patristic Trinity texts · Scripture core (Gen 1:27 · John 17:21 · 2 Cor 3:18)
The Thompson Module — Shame Curriculum + Confessional Group Facilitation
6–7 sessions · the operational practice; possibly a certificate sub-program
Shame as master story · confession as antidote · 4-pillar architecture · 5 pastoral failure modes · group facilitation skills · when to refer
📖 Thompson — Soul of Shame + Anatomy of the Soul (REQUIRED) · Soul of Desire (group leaders)
→ Center for Being Known training as recommended continuing-ed
Pastoral Care Across the 9 IPNB Domains
8–10 sessions · one per major domain with theology + practice + cases
L15 narrative pastoral work · L16 family-of-self at the gospel table · L17 PART operationalized
L18 Holy Saturday care + Incarnation · L19 baptismal identity counseling · L20 sanctification dashboard
📖 L11–L20 IPNB captures synthesized · supplemented by Siegel — Pocket Guide
The Wider Christian Voices — Bonhoeffer · Smith · Peterson · Robinson
4–5 sessions · the broader theological field beyond Thompson
Bonhoeffer — Life Together + Day Together/Alone · Smith — liturgy · Peterson — long obedience · Robinson — narrative
📖 Bonhoeffer — Life Together (REQUIRED) · Smith — You Are What You Love · Peterson — Long Obedience
Specialized Pastoral Counseling Topics
6–8 sessions · the topics every pastor encounters but most are untrained for
Grief + end-of-life (Holy Saturday) · marriage crisis (3-systems romance) · betrayal trauma · scrupulosity (Sandy framework)
Gender/sexuality counseling with the biology · anxiety/depression/OCD-spectrum · the referral filter
📖 Case-based · Siegel transcripts · Thompson chapters by topic
Capstone — Pastor's Own Integration Commitment
2–3 sessions · self-care as professional ethics · own confessional community · long-arc commitments
